result.text: Contact: an oversized transport flagged WIDE LOAD, hauling {pick:half a house|a wind turbine blade|an unidentifiable enormous thing under tarps}. Escort protocol, or tarp analysis?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

tarp.text: Tarp analysis: the shape suggests {pick:a fiberglass dinosaur|a decommissioned carousel|a very large fish, statue hopefully}. Confidence: {n:40-80} percent. Push confidence higher?

pushed.text: Confirmed: it IS a fiberglass dinosaur. Destination: a roadside attraction being born. We have witnessed infrastructure of joy in transit, Captain.

wonder.text: Wonder preserved. Under that tarp is everything it could be. This is the correct amount of mystery per mile.

escort.text: Informal escort maintained for {n:2-6} miles. The pilot car waved. We are now part of the wide load's story, and it of ours.
